---
title: "Inclusive Facilitation"
---

{{< include activities/inclusivity-rapid-assessment.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/tool-highlight_think-pair-share.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/participation-benefits.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/debate-to-dialogue.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/thinking-styles.qmd >}}

{{< include activities/brainstorm-thinking-styles.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/tool-highlight_collab-whiteboards.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/participation-access.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/meeting-process-design.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/meeting-online.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/meeting-roles.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/meeting-variants.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/tool-highlight_microstructures.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/meeting-records.qmd >}}

{{< include activities/team-planning.qmd >}}
